action: Add a deterministic CLI that composes repository discovery with continuity inventory interpretation without modifying historical queue records.

selected_from.selection_reason: M-014 explicitly handed off a CLI wrapper that composes repository discovery with the report builder before generating the complete checked-out repository inventory.

unresolved_inherited: classification of intentional versus accidental forks
semantic matching for differently worded but equivalent unresolved claims
resolved_claims: deterministic executable composition of repository discovery and continuity report interpretation

progress.memory: Inventory generation is a third boundary after discovery and interpretation: it composes the two layers, serializes a report, and may write a new artifact, but it must never mutate the historical M-* records it reads.
progress.verification: Source and committed test coverage were reviewed. Test execution and exact-commit CI were not observed, so passing execution is not claimed.

claim_states.observed: The CLI composes buildRepositoryContinuityInventory with buildContinuityInventoryReport, emits stable formatted JSON, optionally writes a caller-selected artifact, and does not alter discovered history.
claim_states.inferred: Separating execution and serialization from discovery and interpretation makes provenance boundaries inspectable and reduces accidental semantic coupling.
claim_states.proposed: Run the CLI in a checked-out default branch and preserve the complete generated report through CI or a reviewed evidence commit.
claim_states.superseded: Manual ad hoc composition as the only route to generating a repository continuity inventory.
unresolved: classification of intentional versus accidental forks
semantic matching for differently worded but equivalent unresolved claims

privacy_boundary: Only public repository code, abstract queue metadata, and commit metadata were used. Raw private chat, health and pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
handoff: Execute the committed CLI against a checked-out default branch, preserve the complete generated inventory as evidence, and add CI that fails on malformed records, missing dependencies, or dropped unresolved claims without rewriting historical M-* files.
